title: pleione dayana
intro: Pleione dayana, also known as the Pleione orchid or Chinese golden orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pleione dayana are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema. The herbal preparations of Pleione dayana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by boiling the plant's roots and flowers in water or mixing the extract with other herbs.
